input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 89 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "respiratory", "count": 11, "message": "11 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 21, "message": "21 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}, {"category": "general", "count": 14, "message": "14 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 6, "message": "6 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "cardiac", "count": 14, "message": "14 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "neuro", "count": 7, "message": "7 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}, {"category": "injury", "count": 5, "message": "5 injury patients incoming", "protocol": "Mass casualty protocol consideration"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 11, "message": "11 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": null, "current_utilization": 148, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "St. Michael's Hospital", "facility_id": "st-michaels", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to St. Michael's Hospital (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "SickKids Hospital", "facility_id": "sickkids", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to SickKids Hospital (0% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Charge Nurse, immediately activate critical protocols for respiratory (isolation), mental health (crisis team), cardiac (pre-alert cath lab), neuro (stroke code readiness), injury (mass casualty consideration), and GI (infection control) clusters. Although capacity is stable for the next two hours, with 89 incoming patients and current high utilization, consider diverting CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, St. Michael's, or SickKids to optimize flow.
